programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Collateral Damages

programme.title: The King of Queens: Cowardly Lyin'
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie try to be more open in their relationship after Doug is caught lying.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Driving Reign

programme.title: The King of Queens: Clothes Encounter
programme.desc: Carrie has a problem when she can't stop buying expensive clothes and returning them.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Queens'bro Bridge
programme.desc: Doug sees a chance to reclaim his privacy when he learns that Arthur inherited a house.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dog Shelter
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug's parents have been hiding the truth about his dog, Rocky.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Taste Buds
programme.desc: When Doug doesn't get his way, he tries to brainwash Arthur into wanting what he wants.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Bed Spread
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover a new independence in their lives when they sleep in twin beds.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Less I
programme.desc: When friends begin complimenting Doug on his new svelte figure, Carrie becomes jealous, so Doug decides to take her on a special trip to make her feel better.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Less II
programme.desc: When friends begin complimenting Doug on his new svelte figure, Carrie becomes jealous, so Doug decides to take her on a special trip to make her feel better.

programme.desc: Doug asks Arthur to teach him the art of ping-pong after he loses repeatedly to Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Dreading Vows
programme.desc: Carrie suggests they renew their wedding vows after Doug is inspired to proclaim his love.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Nocturnal Omission
programme.desc: When Deacon meets another woman, Doug can't decide whether to tell him about his ex-wife.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affidavit Justice
programme.desc: Doug must pretend to be a lawyer when Carrie's law firm asks him to join their ball team.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Secret Garden
programme.desc: Carrie is thrilled with her new gynecologist, but her future with him is put in jeopardy.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Eggsit Strategy
programme.desc: Carrie hears that her law firm is laying off people and worries about her own job.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Thanks, Man
programme.desc: When Carrie decides to host Thanksgiving, an unexpected visitor disrupts the festivities.

programme.title: The King of Queens: American Idle
programme.desc: Carrie says she needs time for herself after losing her job but Doug thinks she's loafing.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Santa Claustrophobia
programme.desc: Doug finds it difficult working with Carrie when she takes a temporary job at his company.

programme.title: Forensic Files: As the Tide Turns
programme.desc: A woman is found dead. A man's version of events was at variance with the evidence, so investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to determine if this was a botched robbery, or cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Tight Leash
programme.desc: Law enforcement officials turn to forensic scientists when they experience difficulty in their attempts to figure out how a stalker was able to steal his victim's personal photographs and obtain the code to her home security system.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Transaction Failed
programme.desc: When a dedicated, well-respected teacher disappeared, police had to determine if she'd gone on vacation without telling anyone, or if she was the victim of foul play. Investigators turned to forensic science, hoping to find the answers they needed.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Deceived to Death
programme.desc: A man's estranged wife hires a man to beat her husband to death. Then, a serial molester in Oregon abducts two women at knifepoint.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: The Disappearing
programme.desc: A mother kills herself, leaving behind no sign of her son. Also, an ex-boyfriend allegedly kills four members of his ex-girlfriend's family.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Point Blank Murder
programme.desc: A man is found dead on his living room floor, three decades later his case remains open. A detective is determined to pin the crime on the man's roommate.

programme.title: The Hunt With John Walsh: Torture House
programme.desc: Two brothers share a grotesque hobby of kidnapping and torturing prostitutes, until one of their victims escapes and leads police to their house of horrors.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

An exclusive and updated insider's account of the World Trade Center attacks on September 11, 2001. The broadcast will include information throughout the program about how viewers can contribute to the Uniformed Firefighters Association Scholarship Fund.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: The Tiger Attack (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 2003, the wildly successful careers of master illusionists Siegfried & Roy comes to a shockingly abrupt end when one of the team’s prized tigers bites Roy Horn on the neck and drags him offstage.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: Dangerous Illusion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Roy tries to recover from severe wounds inflicted by his beloved tiger Mantacore, but the team’s excuses for the animal’s behavior lose credibility upon further investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Killzone
programme.desc: Marty helps homesteaders in Oregon build a barn; Misty creates a subterranean garden; Matt finds a human approach to a mysterious predator threat.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: House of 30,000 Tires
programme.desc: The Raneys arrive in Ohio to find the Broadhead family struggling to survive in their home made of 30,000 tire bales. Battling intruding pests, flooding, and unstable walls, the Raneys have their hands full in one of their most challenging rescues yet.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Cobbers Nightmare
programme.desc: The Raneys continue rescuing the Broadhead's tire bale homestead in Central Ohio. The clock is ticking in part two of this rescue as Marty, Misty, and Matt work to provide fresh water, strengthen walls, and jumpstart an indoor garden.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Winter Washout
programme.desc: In Alaska, Marty races to rescue his property from a deluge of snow runoff. In Hawaii, Matt builds a human-sized slingshot to bring down invasive trees. The Raneys check-in with homesteaders rebuilding after devastating wildfires.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homestead Business is Booming
programme.desc: The Raneys convince dog-mushing homesteaders to make drastic changes despite their distrust of outsiders. Later, an Idaho family's flock gets some new protection and a Smoky Mountain homestead becomes a newly viable business.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Winter Washout
programme.desc: In Alaska, Marty races to rescue his property from a deluge of snow runoff. In Hawaii, Matt builds a human-sized slingshot to bring down invasive trees. The Raneys check-in with homesteaders rebuilding after devastating wildfires.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: To Build and Protect
programme.desc: Marty builds a bridge across a creek to save a single mom and her daughter from rampaging moose. After a couple's dog is killed, the Raneys help protect them so they are not the next victims. The Raneys are shocked to find a bear den near their homestead.

programme.title: Surviving the Cut: Army Sniper
programme.desc: The best soldiers learn the craft of shooting from extreme distances and are put to the test to see if they can make the critical kill shot. Miss by an inch and they're shipped home. Half will not survive the cut.

programme.title: Surviving the Cut: Air Force Combat Diver
programme.desc: Students are pushed to the limit as they struggle to learn the art of staying calm in adverse underwater conditions. One in three will not survive the cut.

programme.title: The Flight That Fought Back
programme.desc: What took terrorists two years to plan only took 40 strangers and 30 minutes to defeat on Flight 93, September 11, 2001. This documentary features actual voice recordings, personal accounts of family and friends and extensive research.

programme.title: The Flight That Fought Back
programme.desc: What took terrorists two years to plan only took 40 strangers and 30 minutes to defeat on Flight 93, September 11, 2001. This documentary features actual voice recordings, personal accounts of family and friends and extensive research.

programme.title: Osama Bin Laden: The Finish
programme.desc: The inside story of how Osama Bin Ladin was captured and best-selling author Mark Bowden shares shocking revelations about the origin of the 9/ 11 attacks.

programme.title: Attack on the Pentagon
programme.desc: Examine the day Flight 77 flew into one of the most famous buildings in the world. Through eyewitness accounts, follow the 757 as it descended to within 3,000 feet of the White House, banked over the Potomac, turned and attacked the Pentagon.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: Six men risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold.

programme.title: Secrets of Bin Laden's Lair
programme.desc: SEAL Team Six obtained more than Osama Bin Laden, they got his hard drives and papers. What was in his files is more shocking than anyone could have thought.

programme.title: The 9/ 11 Tapes: Chaos in the Sky
programme.desc: Audio recordings reveal the emotion and panic of those responding to the 9/11 attacks. Air traffic controllers, military commanders and those on hijacked planes relay the chaos and courage of civilians reacting to the moments that changed America.

programme.title: 9/ 11 Rescue Cops
programme.desc: The extraordinary untold story of the heroism and sacrifice of the NYPD's elite rescue squad, the Emergency Service Unit, on 9/ 11.

programme.title: 9/11: The Towers and the Pentagon
programme.desc: The attack of 9/11 resulted in the total collapse of the Twin Towers, but the Pentagon withstood it. Forensic engineers study the structural consequences of the attacks and explain why the results were so different.

programme.title: 9/11: After the Towers Fell
programme.desc: When the Twin Towers collapsed on September 11, 2001, thousands were feared trapped beneath the tons of steel and rubble. Rescue workers, family, and friends rushed to Ground Zero to save the buried. These are the stories of the race to rescue survivors.

programme.title: The 9/ 11 Surfer
programme.desc: Pasquale Buzzelli shares his 9/11 survival story of how he slid down debris from the 22nd floor.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Somewhere in There Is a Foot
programme.desc: Stacy's life-threatening scar on her foot has left her hopeless, but she's giving it one last shot. David has the worst case of foot fungus Dr. Schaeffer has seen, and Morgan, an erotic paranormal romance novelist, is hoping to her sixth toe amputated.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Looks Bad, Feels Worse
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent is challenged with a case when a women with giant springs on her shoes enters her office. A man with a rare disease has the largest feet Dr. Schaeffer has ever seen, and an athlete with two different sized feet becomes a difficult surgery.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Nose No Bounds
programme.desc: April is covered in bumps that have disfigured her arms. Genner has flown all the way from the Philippines to have Dr. Lee help with his bumpy nose. Chris suffers from psoriasis that nearly covers his body and a bump on his head.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: Adventures in Pimplepopping
programme.desc: Inoke has a huge, possibly life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns with his back lump after Dr. Lee removed a liter of fluid from it. Reed has hundreds of bumps on his chest that burst and leave nasty scars.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Pop Ups: Runaway Bump, Never Coming Back?
programme.desc: Leonard has an alarming bump hanging off of his arm that looks like it's breaking through the skin. Brandon has several lumps on his head that makes him fearful for his life. Jess got a noticeable lump on her butt after falling down the stairs.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Mystery Blisters: Diagnosis Unknown
programme.desc: Fun-loving Che'Re has a squishy, dark bump on her cheek that has left her depressed and self-conscious. Buck has been breaking out in painful, fluid-filled blisters for three years. Telly developed a massive bump behind his head after being hit by a car.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: First Steps: Achy Break-y Feet
programme.desc: A man with 'lobster claws' for feet has Dr. Schaeffer determined to find a surgical solution, and Dr. Vincent meets a woman with a foot so large people mistake it for a ski boot. When Donald walks for Dr. Haller, she can't believe her eyes.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Trouble with Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection. Surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

programme.desc: Inoke has a huge, possibly life-threatening bulge on his shoulder. Delano returns with his back lump after Dr. Lee removed a liter of fluid from it. Reed has hundreds of bumps on his chest that burst and leave nasty scars.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Trouble with Toes
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent uses a cadaver bone to fix a woman's foot who's deathly afraid of infection. Surgery to correct a woman's webbed toes becomes a crisis for Dr. Schaeffer when she develops a dangerous complication that could cost the patient her toes.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Zombie Uprising
programme.desc: A Halloween zombie with a problem below the belt mystifies doctors. Later, a doctor makes mistake that amazingly explains a patient's condition.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Oh, Deer!
programme.desc: A college student's head is impaled by a trophy deer's antlers. A car crash victim leads the doctor to believe her baby may still be at the accident scene. A nurse's ex-boyfriend brings his new girlfriend to the ER, and the nurse must help save her life.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Tight, Strapless and Sexy!
programme.desc: Whytnee wants a sexy dress to suit her vixen image, Carla wants to show more skin than her mother would like, and 52-years-young Dina is ready to try on her gown, saying it will fit right if it fits tight.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Style Therapy
programme.desc: Edgy bride Callie is more concerned with pleasing her mom than sticking to her own style.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: You ARE a Daredevil!
programme.desc: Paralympic snowboarder Amy Purdy isn't afraid to take risks, like waiting to find her dress just three weeks before the big day. Katie is the ultimate planner and brings a list ranking her top gowns.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: I'm Not the Size of a Hanger!
programme.desc: Southern bride Danielle gets some help from her girlfriends in the quest to find the perfect glamorous gown. Jen is having a beer-themed wedding, but wants her dress to be more traditional. Katie worries her large assets won't fit in her wedding gown.

programme.title: Counting On: Marriage Bootcamp
programme.desc: Jinger and Jeremy decide to hold a yard sale before their big move to L.A. They must put their haggling skills to work and try to sell as much as they can. Meanwhile, the married couples attend a marriage retreat where they focus on their relationships.

programme.title: Counting On: Five Pregnancies and Counting
programme.desc: Five Duggars are pregnant. The ladies attend a garden party to celebrate. Ben and Jessa take a trip down memory lane five years after their engagement. Josiah and Lauren are concerned when their gender reveal balloon floats away. Jessa goes into labour.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Kelly and Rebecca
programme.desc: Kelly shows her best friend her stockpile and takes her along on a shopping spree to show off her skills. Rebecca brings her skeptical husband along to spark some interest.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Zadia and Briana
programme.desc: Zadia takes her friends couponing to prove that she can still get super savings. Briana and her boyfriend, Jose, want to get engaged, but Briana won't let him go into debt to pay for the ring.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Julie and Faatima
programme.desc: Julie has the chance to land her dream job: being paid to coupon for a sober home for teenage boys.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: April and Carla
programme.desc: April shops to feed 200 parishioners and her family for a month for under $100. Carla shops to feed 20 guests at her lake house.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Surprise Bride
programme.desc: Ashley pulls off a surprise World War II themed wedding in front of her family and friends, and Liz introduces her bridal party with a flash mob dance. Sarah's entertainment includes flip cup, while Allison shocks with bridesmaids in white.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ....and Flying Beach Balls
programme.desc: Ashley's wedding guests toss beach balls instead of rice and Anissa's guests are brought to tears by her family ring exchange.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Double Wedding from Hell
programme.desc: Gypsy BFFs Amber and Stefanie are planning a double wedding, but a jealous cousin will stop at nothing to hijack the big day and steal back Amber's fiancé! Gypsy wrestler Priscilla's birthday may turn into a cage match if her father shows up uninvited.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Gypsy Princesses on the Prowl
programme.desc: The annual Gypsy Ball is back, and there's more romance and drama than ever as six single Gypsies get blinged out for a fairy-tale-themed party in New Orleans. But not all princesses are guaranteed a happily ever after.

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: Reverse the Gypsy Curse
programme.desc: Brittany plans a traditional Gypsy funeral for her beloved late father, hoping to reverse a curse of bad luck that began after he was cremated. Maryann will only let her daughter Lexi marry gorger Kenny if he disowns his entire family.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Shively
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some 'paranorm-ish activity,' do some 'attempted man' and meet some animals that are 'milk ready.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: The Happy Everything Episode
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel celebrate the holiday season by fighting through 'Black and Blue Friday,' 'Gettin' Ugly,' with Christmas sweaters, and spinning some 'Human Driedels.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CLXXXVIII
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo play match-maker in 'cast mates', go through ups and downs in 'good times bad times', and take a painful trip to the 'thundergtound'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jordan Clarkson
programme.desc: Laker shooting guard Jordan Clarkson hangs out with Rob, Steelo and Chanel. They throw down Jammies, observe the Tongue Cam and learn about Gettin' Laked.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXCVI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel, and Steelo take a look at the best moments in 'scrap-worthy', vibe way too hard in 'high on the music' and explore the magic of headwear in 'bandana badasses'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXCIV

programme.title: Nightwatch: Trust the Ones You're With

programme.title: Nightwatch: Pride

programme.title: Nightwatch: Stranger Things
programme.desc: A woman tells officers her boyfriend once brought her back to life after she was murdered. A purse snatching suspect stops running to eat some chicken strips, and a tarot card reader gets dehydrated.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Heroes Among Us
programme.desc: When the men and women serving New Orleans get word that one of their own has been critically injured, they reflect on the risks they all take.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Memorable Cases and Chases
programme.desc: We revisit the most memorable police, fire, and EMS cases from the past 20 episodes. With, shocking revelations, never-seen-before footage, and the New Orleans first responders that you have come to love.

programme.title: Live Rescue
programme.desc: Firefighters, paramedics and EMTs across the country bravely put their lives on the line responding to emergency calls.

programme.title: Live Rescue
programme.desc: Firefighters, paramedics and EMTs across the country bravely put their lives on the line responding to emergency calls.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Mime and Punishment
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr and Q put the nasty in namaste when they lead guided meditations. Tonight's big loser gets boxed in with a 24-hour punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Guilty as Charged
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q enlist shoppers to help them avoid a rogue security guard, and tonight's big loser faces the wrath of a crowd of rockers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q don absurd disguises to trick unsuspecting receptionists, then try to convince strangers to sign off on some unusual emails. Plus, the big loser turns a harmless dance class into a dance with danger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Antisocial Network
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q play matchmakers at the food court, then switch fields to pose as architects, sharing some perplexing new building technology. Plus, tonight's big loser makes a connection while networking, and won't let go.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sucks for You
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr bus their way through Katz’s Deli, then express some unpopular opinions at the park. Plus, tonight’s big loser must talk his way through some real highs and lows, in a punishment that truly sucks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Cake Loss
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe mean no disrespect to patrons at a food court, then cut to the chase while posing as tailors. Later, strangers pick sides in a wild debate, and tonight's big loser takes the cake with his crumby punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 1
programme.desc: Be a guest at a dinner party with the stars of the show. Join Sal, Joe, Q and Murr aka 'The Tenderloins,' as they dish about their week, their friendship and whatever else is thrown on their dinner table.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 2
programme.desc: Take a seat at the table as the guys dish out what they've been up to this week at home. Get a glimpse of how the guys really hang out and, after some grub, they'll battle it out over who will be hosting next week's meal.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: The amount of times Joe showed his butt on the show. Why the volunteers were turned away for Tool Bag.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Significant Others and Significant Brothers

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: All About Meme

programme.title: The Daily Pop
programme.desc: Our entertainment insiders take on the top stories of the day.

programme.desc: What makes the Kardashians the Kardashians? Take a closer look at the funny, sexy and outrageous moments when we all fell in love with Reality's First Family.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Khloé's New Breast Friends
programme.desc: Kim finds herself in a major ordeal when she unknowingly upsets her mom after helping Cait get ready for the ESPY awards. Meanwhile, Khloé tests out life with bigger breasts, and Scott searches for a healthy way to keep himself occupied.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord Disick Returns
programme.desc: The family heads to San Diego for MJ's birthday, but Rob bails and goes missing after a fight with Chyna. Meanwhile, Scott goes to great lengths to resurrect the Lord after much prodding from the family, and Kim struggles with doing North's hair.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Lord of the Cougars
programme.desc: Kendall suffers from sleep paralysis, which threatens her work and travel life. Meanwhile, Kim searches for methods to control her anxiety and Scott develops an unlikely friendship with Kris and her girlfriends.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Controversies and Legacies
programme.desc: Kim's decision to try for a third child proves to be a matter of life and death. Meanwhile Kendall fears backlash from supporting stricter gun control, and Kris gets emotional upon recognizing her mom won't be around forever.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: New Kids on the Butcher Block
programme.desc: Two former winners of Food Network Star, Jeff Mauro and Justin Warner, turn the tables on Bobby as they bring in two fantastic chefs to beat him. Bobby has his work cut out for him with sweet, but fiery, Chef Daniela D'Ambrosio and eager-to-prove-himself.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: She's a Lady
programme.desc: The search is on for two ladies to beat Bobby Flay. In this episode it's cooking show host Giovanna Huyke and caterer Jennifer Bajsel. In the judges seats are Alex Guarnaschelli and Katie Lee.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Choc-O-Love
programme.desc: Alton Brown and Valerie Bertinelli don't want a rocky road on the way to beating Bobby Flay. They use their chocolate expertise to decide whether acclaimed pastry chef David Lebovitz or chef-of-all-trades Ryan Scott will be able to fight Bobby.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: A Taste of Summer
programme.desc: It's a roller coaster of a battle when Carnival Eats' Noah Cappe teams up with Worst Cooks in America's Anne Burrell to choose between Los Angeles' acclaimed chef Mark Peel and Brooklyn's Nick Williams.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle 1
programme.desc: For this tournament event, 16 champions are back to defeat Chef Bobby Flay. In the premiere battle, a strangely sweet sandwich and beautiful seafood await the champs. Round two involves an unusual beef jerky product and a twist on hummus.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle 2
programme.desc: In this battle, the first basket includes champion-caliber ingredients like an anything-but-basic burger. The three chefs in round two have ambitious plans for their dishes, and a green veggie is part of the puzzle in the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle 3
programme.desc: In the first round, an oven mishap leads to an alarming situation. An American classic in frozen form threatens to stump the chefs in the entree round, and the dessert round leaves the champs to make big plans for a candy-themed tart.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Battle 4
programme.desc: In the first round, the chefs cook up appetizers using pizza bites and caviar. The entree round has the champs aiming to make the most of a comfort food creation and a basic veggie. The dessert round includes a sugary cereal and a gelatinous stumper.

programme.title: Chopped: Beat Bobby Flay: Finale Fight
programme.desc: The Beat Bobby Flay Tournament finale brings four winners back for a chance to defeat a Food Network legend and score $50,000. In round one, a pork product goes through a grinder, and a canned item in the second basket isn't what the chefs hoped for.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Late Night Paradise
programme.desc: The nation’s hottest late night spots; starring beer soaked pulled pork smothered with mac n' cheese in Florida, the juiciest, crunchiest fried chicken in Texas, and sweet chicken sausage doused in a spicy cheese sauce in Atlanta.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Mac N' Cheese Paradise
programme.desc: America's cheesiest Mac n' Cheese; featuring a sharp cheddar mac topped with meaty chili in Wisconsin, a five cheese mac sautéed with hunks of lobster and shaved truffles in Maine, and a BBQ mac oozing with pulled pork in Atlanta.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Bar Food

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Roots
programme.desc: Guy digs into dishes with a personal connection, including a Jewish deli in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort and Soul
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hittin' up some joints that'll warm the palate and the soul. In Portland, Ore., a funky neighbourhood cafe is cranking out comfort foods like the heartless artichoke sandwich and a curried lentil dish that hits all the right notes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soup-Centric
programme.desc: Guy is filling up on some soup. In Baltimore, the authentic Irish pub is serving seafood gumbo and a twist on traditional corned beef and cabbage.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Timeless Traditions

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross Country Comfort Food

programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's checking out all kinds of food across Flavortown. In Boulder City, Nevada, a chili-churning diner is keeping it all in the family. An old-school breakfast spot has gone big with four locations around Arizona.

programme.desc: An icing event prevents some boats to return home. One of the boats gets trapped in a blackout while navigating an iceberg minefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Bitter, Bloody End
programme.desc: A veteran deckhand pays dearly for a mistake. Some men will rise and some will fall but not all will make it home.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Nowhere to Go But Down

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: The Bitter, Bloody End
programme.desc: A veteran deckhand pays dearly for a mistake. Some men will rise and some will fall but not all will make it home.

programme.desc: Across the fleet, captains battle the descending polar ice pack to save their pots, but it's a losing war. The Northwestern and Wizard struggle to escape St. Paul harbor, while the rest of the fleet scrambles to keep their Opilio season alive.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Collision Course
programme.desc: The polar ice pack invades the opilio crab grounds. Two deckhands fall victim to an ice assault.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Danger Down Under
programme.desc: The Barramundi is a dream fish that is nearly impossible to find in the wild, unless you head way off the grid. The crew travels to the Land Down Under where Aboriginal guides will take them to a Barra fisherman's paradise.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Don't Lose Your Head
programme.desc: The Mahseer has been fished almost to extinction. Its last stronghold may be in the jungles of Borneo, an area controlled by the headhunting Dayak people. The boys will need to risk life, limb and maybe their heads to find if this rumor is true.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Four friends begin a challenging jungle expedition in search of a giant golden dorado, possibly dwelling within a remote Bolivian river. To find their way there, they must conquer torrential rains, vicious insects and isolated tribes.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Tacos and Tarpon
programme.desc: When the team heard reports of an untouched mecca for tarpon in Mexico, they were all over it. To get to these untouched 'Silver Kings,' the crew needs to navigate a maze of croc and mosquito-infested waterways and lagoons.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Eye of the Tigerfish
programme.desc: The guys head deep into Zambia, chasing reports of large tigerfish - a fierce freshwater predator - in an uncharted river. The only thing standing in their way is 400 miles of unpaved roads, crocodiles, hippos and a serious lack of fuel.

programme.title: Fish or Die: The Four Norsemen
programme.desc: The team follows a lead to an extremely remote river in Greenland, believed to hold massive Arctic char. With its barren tundra, towering fjords, and ice-carved valleys, they discover Greenland is wilderness at its most pure and most dangerous.

programme.title: Fish or Die: Amazon Giant
programme.desc: The Arapaima is the largest scaled freshwater fish in the world and considered the ultimate jungle catch. The crew heads to one of the most remote and inhospitable jungles of Ecuador to try and land one of these living dinosaurs.

programme.title: River Monsters: Alaskan Horror
programme.desc: Wade seeks a dangerous lake monster from native legends.

programme.title: River Monsters: Coral Reef Killer
programme.desc: When a snorkeler is impaled and killed by an unseen underwater assailant in the waters surrounding the tropical island of Sulawesi in Indonesia, Jeremy Wade travels to the remote islands to investigate a spate of similar attacks across the region.

programme.title: River Monsters: Deep Sea Demon
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes in search of the real creature behind the enduring legend of the sea serpent -- starting with a violent attack in the English Channel and culminating in the dark depths of the Mediterranean Sea.

programme.title: River Monsters: Killer Weapons
programme.desc: From stabbing spines and toxic barbs to lethal electric shocks and serrated clubs, Jeremy examines the vicious and varied ways that fish attack.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Condo Cleanup
programme.desc: A young millennial's recent home improvement projects have made it hard for her to sell her condo. Twins Leslie and Lyndsay transform her DIY disaster into a hip, modern home, perfect for a first-time home buyer.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Road House to Show House
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay help a family struggling to sell their roadside rambler. Hoping to distract buyers from the road noise outside, the twins make some bold design choices to turn the dated ranch house into a stylish home that a new family will love.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: No Appeal to Curb Appeal
programme.desc: A couple that's desperate to sell their bungalow after receiving no offers calls on real estate experts and twins Leslie and Lyndsay. The home needs some love to make it sellable, but the stakes are raised when the twins invest money to make improvements.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Starter Home Transformation
programme.desc: A sister who is trying to help sell her brother's property has had no luck finding a buyer. Lyndsay and Leslie come to the rescue by updating the small starter home with Scandinavian design elements and an outdoor oasis that's perfect for entertaining.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rough Rambler Reno
programme.desc: A young family has outgrown their home, but major exterior issues and a dark interior are keeping it from being sold. Leslie and Lyndsay brighten and repair the outdated rambler, but pricing it right will be difficult with no comps in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses: Rental Property Reno

programme.desc: Ryan pitches his brand new seven-story Chelsea townhouse as a smart-home paradise for tech enthusiasts, but soon finds himself squaring off with Steve's boss in a tense negotiation. Luis and Ronita explore the idea of reuniting, as business partners.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Jess We Can
programme.desc: Luis and Ronita orchestrate private showings for their first co-listing together, but he steals the show; Ryan lands luxury properties, but is burdened with rental units; Steve's own apartment becomes his latest listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Construction Criticism
programme.desc: Steve puts on a rubber mask to observe Jess at her first broker's open house, but when he's forced to deliver some bad news about the listings, his true character emerges. Fredrik follows a lead for his Tribeca listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: The Weight Is Over
programme.desc: Ryan bets a Chelsea loft commission on a ping-pong match, then goes costume shopping for a big open house in NOHO. While Steve's girlfriend, Luiza, settles into their new home together, he helps a successful high school buddy try and buy an apartment.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Polar Opposites
programme.desc: Ryan interviews eager agents for his new team, but following a call from his seller to discuss a lack of offers, Ryan may be the one in the hot seat. Steve and his friend, Phil, hit the gym and end up on an offer that leaves them pumped, and more.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Better Laight than Never
programme.desc: Fredrik hustles to get offers during his disco-themed open house on Charlton St., but the party gets real funky when Ryan arrives for a dance-off. Steve takes a novel approach to selling by hosting a book-launch open house at his new building for artists.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: The Snowball Effect
programme.desc: As Steve works tirelessly to install an elevator in his new listing, the ups-and-downs of negotiating the final price might leave him stuck without a deal. Meanwhile, Tyler hosts a morning open house for his latest Central Park listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Coast Stories
programme.desc: Ryan invites an illusionist to make an offer at his packed open house. Fredrik goes to Hollywood - but there's no time to relax when LA agent Josh Altman isn't thrilled that he's building a West Coast team. Steve finds himself in a professional pickle.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Loss Angeles
programme.desc: Ryan nervously premieres a music video for his Tribeca loft, but worries that his dancing skills might not be in step with buyers' expectations.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York: Ruffled Heathers
programme.desc: Fredrik has a run-in with L.A. agent Heather Altman at his open house, but she and her husband Josh are closed-off to the idea of him opening up a West Coast team. Back in Manhattan, Ryan markets a beautiful Park Avenue apartment with secret buyers.

programme.title: Snapped: Lucille Duncan
programme.desc: When a body is discovered in the woods, authorities ask if he's the victim of revenge from an ex-girlfriend, her over-protective brother or her 14-year-old son.

programme.title: Snapped: Tina Williamson
programme.desc: A deadly shooting raises questions about an elderly man's business dealings and his friendship with a much younger woman.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally
programme.desc: A land developer disappears into the Arizona desert, and a brother sets out to uncover the truth. But when hikers stumble onto a gruesome discovery, investigators quickly realize no one can be trusted when they find themselves in the line of fire.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Blood in the Backyard
programme.desc: A mom and her newborn inexplicably vanish from their California home. When blood is discovered in their backyard, a grieving father is scrutinized and investigators race against the clock to bring this mother and child home before it's too late.

programme.title: Snapped: Misook Wang
programme.desc: While a community searches for a missing businesswoman, police uncover a shocking dispute with a money-hungry relative that they hope will lead them to a killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Whitney Harris
programme.desc: A young mother claims she was caught up in her boyfriend’s murderous plan.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Patrick Frazee and Krystal Kenney
programme.desc: When Colorado mother, Kelsey Berreth, disappeared in 2018, the search for her would uncover a secret romance that burned with deadly passion. Featuring exclusive interviews with Kelsey's family friends and the investigators who broke the case.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Jordan Hodge and Kenny Carlisle
programme.desc: A beloved grandmother and her new husband go missing, triggering an investigation that reveals a twisted tale of first love and a motive fueled by obsession and greed.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Antoinette Martinez and Cameo Clines
programme.desc: A horrific killing spree in Texas sets off an investigation that uncovers a sordid web of seduction and a pair of killers driven by greed and bloodlust.

programme.title: Dateline: In the Shadow of Justice: The Interrogation
programme.desc: A young man who confessed to killing a young mother and her son says his confession was false and coerced and getting the conviction reversed would take a miracle.

programme.title: Dateline: The Deed
programme.desc: When a beloved couple is brutally murdered in their South Carolina home, the investigation exposes a feud and tears a family apart.

programme.title: Dateline: Smoke and Mirrors
programme.desc: Keith Morrison reports on a Chicago woman from a large family missing for several days. As the whole city joins in the search, detectives begin to suspect that a man in her life has many secrets.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled
programme.desc: At first it looked like a home invasion gone wrong, a robbery that resulted in the murder of Ralph Candelario's wife, Pam. Ralph was found at the crime scene dazed and confused but his confusing story had police questioning his version of events.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Over the Edge
programme.desc: Explore what happened that September night when romance turned to danger. Something went terribly wrong and a woman slipped over the edge of a cliff. Did she fall by accident or was she pushed. It would take almost 20 years to find answers.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Suspicion
programme.desc: The neighbors you’re about to meet enjoyed mixing business with pleasure then a murder made them face the reality that a killer was in their midst.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Confession
programme.desc: Soon after Angie Dodge was murdered, Christopher Tapp admitted he was one of her killers. Police captured his confession on videotape so why would the victim's mom, who once campaigned to put Tapp in prison fight to free him.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Lynsie Disappeared
programme.desc: It was a mystery that stumped investigators for years. A college student disappeared after a night out clubbing. Her mother thought she was at a sleepover with friends and it took an eagle-eyed detective to find the truth buried in a pile of lies.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Mist
programme.desc: A young mom, married to her high school sweetheart, vanishes. Did she leave her family to start a new life or was there another reason for her disappearance? Decades later her grown son faced a dark truth at the core of this mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Capture
programme.desc: Amanda Lindhout was a journalist braving the world's most dangerous hotspots. Then, she became the story. What she endured from her captors was terrifying. Years later they found her again and secret agents put a daring undercover sting into action.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Eric Glisson was convicted of a murder he swore he didn't commit. To prove his innocence, he had to find the real killers, unearthing their long-held secrets. It would take years for the truth to be revealed, but could it set him free?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Disappearance of Sandi Johnson
programme.desc: Sandi Johnson always put her kids first. When she vanished without a word, her loved ones were frantic. Police discovered dark secrets in Sandi's marriage and several men in her life. Which one of them had something to hide?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: 12 Minutes on Elm Street
programme.desc: Cousins Nick Brady and Haile Kifer were best friends. To their family, they seemed like typical teenagers. Turns out, the cousins had a secret that led to tragedy. The story divided a small town and sparked a national debate.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: In the Middle of the Night

programme.title: What on Earth?: Island of Alien Ooze
programme.desc: Satellite images capture a volcanic island that suddenly appears in the Pacific Ocean, and when NASA scientists arrive to investigate, they are baffled to find its home to a primordial slime and zombie creatures with origins in outer space.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Killer in the Castle
programme.desc: An abandoned castle is the site of hundreds of horrific murders perpetrated by the mysterious countess who once lived there, a woman alleged to be one of the most prolific killers in history; new discoveries reveal what really happened here.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Island of Alien Ooze

programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Ghosts on a Comet
programme.desc: When a Chinese moon rover breaks down, a NASA scientist points to a mysterious material that seemed to sabotage the Apollo missions decades earlier. The Rosetta spacecraft finds a comet that appears to be singing.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Aliens vs. Stalin at Area 51
programme.desc: When a former Area 51 insider alleges that the Roswell UFO incident was a nefarious Soviet conspiracy masterminded by Stalin, experts investigate if it was indeed an enemy plot against America, or whether the confession is just another cover-up.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Red Storm Rising
programme.desc: Two astronauts trapped in the vacuum of space face an agonizing death; the first close up images of Pluto reveal an alien landscape, and residents of Houston struggle to explain videos of unidentified flying lights captured above their city at night.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Revenge of the Fireflies
programme.desc: NASA investigates so called space fireflies that are attacking the brains of astronauts.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files: Interstellar Gold Rush
programme.desc: A distant planet shows evidence of an Earth-like atmosphere, while a mysterious glowing light suggests the impossible - an atmosphere on the Moon. Have we found evidence of a crashed alien ship on the asteroid belt and why are there blueberries on Mars?

programme.title: You Have Been Warned: Zeroes to Heroes
programme.desc: Ultimate scientific fails! Featuring the most scared man on the internet, the Mexican firework hammer fail, US guy sticks his tongue to a lamppost and the original pioneer of the ‘Nutshot’ – the man who busts balls for a living!

programme.title: Shattered: The Last Song

programme.title: Shattered: One Wrong Turn

programme.title: Shattered: Driftwood Killer
programme.desc: 1994. New Castle, DE. A deadly fire claims what appears to be an innocent victim, leaving a woman shaken by her sister's death... a detective learns the fire is not an accident - but a murder... and a man discovers the true nature of his brother.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: I Speak For Amy
programme.desc: College athlete Kayleigh Ballantyne is returning home one night when she is violently attacked. As she battles for her life, she is unaware that elsewhere in the city an investigation is already underway following the discovery of a young woman's body.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: The Ballad of Botham Jean
programme.desc: Accountant Botham Jean's dreams of returning to St. Lucia to become Prime Minister were cut short in 2018 when he was shot in his Dallas apartment. Now, Botham's brother relives the moment he hugged Botham's murderer in an astounding act of forgiveness.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: The Ballad of Botham Jean
programme.desc: Accountant Botham Jean's dreams of returning to St. Lucia to become Prime Minister were cut short in 2018 when he was shot in his Dallas apartment. Now, Botham's brother relives the moment he hugged Botham's murderer in an astounding act of forgiveness.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Screaming Terror
programme.desc: Alice Hufnagle was raped and murdered on November 22. 2002. After following numerous leads and dead-ends, Police find the vital clues that lead them to Jeffery Vample, Alice's co-worker from a local Pharmacy.

programme.title: Impact of Murder: I Speak For Amy
programme.desc: College athlete Kayleigh Ballantyne is returning home one night when she is violently attacked. As she battles for her life, she is unaware that elsewhere in the city an investigation is already underway following the discovery of a young woman's body.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Deadly Isolation
programme.desc: Chad and Jo meet by chance and to this pair of free spirits, their connection feels cosmic. They fall in love and move far from everyone they know. Soon their new life is ripped apart by jealous ex-partners, isolation, and a desperate need for control.

programme.title: Fatal Vows: Honkytonk Killer
programme.desc: Shorty and Cotton seem perfect for each other, they love dancing, motorcycles and each other. But looks can be deceiving, and after a tragic accident reveals a life of lies and deceit, one of them will ultimately dance with the devil to the death.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Bump in the Night
programme.desc: Reeling from the death of their mother, Annie and Jessica Andrews perform a séance to see if they can contact her spirit. Soon after, strange things start happening in the house.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A flight attendant who never travels alone offers to break her own rule once for a quick trip to Detroit, but finds more than she bargained for in her hotel room.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Midlife Crisis
programme.desc: After a string of bad dates, Texas social worker Deborah Houchin believes she's finally found the man of her dreams. But not long after talk turns to marriage, Deborah disappears. It will take the help of her coworkers to find out what happened.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: Seeds of Death
programme.desc: When a young woman is found shot to death near a small Alaskan village, detectives rely on forensic science and to catch her murderer. Then an eyewitness comes forward with an explosive revelation that threatens to tear apart the small town.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: Root of All Evil
programme.desc: When a little girl disappears from a small Washington town over Fourth of July weekend, detectives look at suspects close to home. When her body is found two weeks later, forensic science and a tip leads to a trusted friend with a terrifying past.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: A Knock at the Door
programme.desc: The 1994 torture and murder of a married mother of three shakes the heartland community of Newton, Kansas to its core. And when a woman goes missing in nearby Wichita, police learn that the cases might be linked by the same sadistic killer.

programme.title: The Face of Evil: Burning Secrets
programme.desc: When an 80-year-old woman is murdered after leaving to running errands, Flint, Michigan investigators discover her case is tied to an unsolved drive-by shooting. Police must use science and skillful interrogation to catch a remorseless killer.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Swipe Right for Murder
programme.desc: When Ashley Pegram goes missing after meeting a man through a dating app, the race to find her focuses on her internet admirer. Detectives soon discover she is caught up in a nightmarish trap set by an online predator with murder on his mind.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Too Fast, Too Young
programme.desc: After a troubled childhood, 13-year old Christina Long's life seems to be on the up and up. Now living with her beloved Aunt Shelly, Christina is a popular honor student and cheerleader. But when her online life is revealed, it tells a more tragic story.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Be Careful Who U Wish 4
programme.desc: A girl recovering from an abusive relationship looks for love on a popular dating site.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Love You to Death
programme.desc: Adopted 17-year-old Chelsea Schobert has always felt out of place at home. She seeks acceptance online where she meets Shawn. But as their relationship develops, all is not as it seems and the whole family is drawn into a devastating series of events.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies
programme.desc: The truths of the world's most clandestine institutions, top-secret locations and symbols.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Secret Prisons
programme.desc: The dark history of America's Secret Prisons is revealed.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Pearl Harbor was a day that changed American history and life forever. But was the attack really a surprise? What did FDR know about the attack beforehand? An investigation into who really fired the first shots of the Pacific War?

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Air Aces: George Beurling
programme.desc: Canadian George Beurling broke every rule in the book yet became one of the greatest fighter pilots of World War II.

programme.title: Air Aces: Douglas Bader
programme.desc: In July 1940, Britain's most celebrated air ace, Douglas Bader, and his ragtag squadron of Canadian fighter pilots, went into battle against Hitler's mighty Luftwaffe.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Smith: The Two-Fisted Marshal of Abeline
programme.desc: Using his fists instead of a pistol, professional boxer turned frontier lawman Tom Smith is determined to clean up 'Hell on Earth.' This is the little known story of one of the greatest lawmen of the Wild West.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Tom Tunney and the Spies of N.Y.
programme.desc: While the First World War rages on in Europe, a German terrorist cell is waging its own secret war on American soil. When a New York City cop uncovers the plot, he must fight to save his country before it's too late.

programme.title: American Lawmen: Melvin Purvis: The Gangbuster
programme.desc: During the Great Depression, a violent crime wave is sweeping the nation. It was up to the FBI's Melvin Purvis to lead a massive manhunt for the most dangerous men in America.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Escape From Moscow
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned double agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Codeman: Trigon
programme.desc: Martha Peterson is a CIA secret weapon, operating as a woman in the man's world of espionage in Cold War Moscow. TRIGON is a KGB turncoat, ready to hand over top secret intelligence to bring down the Soviet Union from within.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Lobster Legacy Shack
programme.desc: A couple inherited their quaint cabin from his grandfather, who originally built the cabin by hand in 1978. With a newly built wharf, the team focus on transforming the former fish and lobster shack into a fun family cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Veterans' Retreat
programme.desc: A man is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families adjust to their new normal. The team are tasked with turning a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center. The key feature will be a deck that can accommodate up to 40.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Retro-fit for the Whole Family
programme.desc: A couple found their own slice of heaven overlooking Lake Annabessacook, only to find out it needed more work than they could provide.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: It Takes a Village
programme.desc: Founded in 1935, Agassiz Village has provided underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience camp. Chase and his team take on a big project with a small budget to help the camp with the support of the community.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big-Time Brother Rebuild in Rhode Island
programme.desc: Business partner brothers look for a vacation home in Coventry, RI. Their real estate agent finds the perfect lakefront fixer-upper, but the to-do list is long and the brothers quickly run into many structural issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Getting Down in Deep Creek, Maryland
programme.desc: A family of six looks for a vacation home on Deep Creek Lake in Maryland. They find the lakefront property of their dreams but it's in need of some major renovations.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Chesapeake Beach Build
programme.desc: A couple looks for a beach retreat in Chesapeake Beach, Maryland, where they can escape the daily hustle and bustle and relax with their six-year-old son.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Out of Date in the Outer Banks
programme.desc: With two active children and busy jobs, Stacey and Doug are hoping to find a beach house in the Outer Banks of North Carolina to give their family a place to relax and recharge. They find a home, but it must be renovated from top to bottom.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Steak Out
programme.desc: We're paying tribute to the best styles, cuts and steakhouses serving up the best steaks. Chef Jonathon Sawyer takes us on a trip to Dayton for a ribeye cut so incredibly, it's fit for a king.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Upper Crust
programme.desc: The best part of any dish is what holds it all together: the crust! Chef Beau MacMillan's favorite pot pie in Phoenix, Arizona, takes on Duff Goldman's seafood pie pick in Baton Rouge, Louisiana.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: The Closers
programme.desc: There's no better way to end a meal than with these delicious dishes. In New York City, Martha Stewart gushes over the most irresistible piece of lemon meringue she's ever had.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Let's Do Lunch
programme.desc: Ali Khan makes a beeline for an over-the-top pistachio chicken salad creation in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: A-Frying In Winter
programme.desc: Noah Cappe chills out with some cool Twin City treats at the Saint Paul Winter Carnival. Despite sub-zero temperatures, he gets into the spirit with local specialties like the Nordic Waffle Pizza and the super-indulgent Biergarten Cupcake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Ham-let
programme.desc: Noah heads to San Diego and hams it up at the Balboa Park December Nights festival. The day starts off right with a breakfast Belgian waffle called the "Ham I Am."

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Dog Time Machine
programme.desc: Noah Cappe takes a trip to the Coastal Carolina Fair near Charleston, S.C., where he samples a local legend, Jack's Cosmic Dog. Trolling the fairgrounds, Noah catches the catfish sundae and takes a bite of fall flavors with the pumpkin cheesecake pop.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Fight Club Sandwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe meets his match with some knock-out fruity feasts at the Florida Strawberry Festival in Plant City. He starts the day with the strawberry French toast burger and slurps the way better strawberry shake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Postman Always Brings Rice
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Hawaii for the Maui Fair where rice is always on the menu. He enjoys traditional Hawaiian treats like the Laulau Feast and Loco Moco and cross-cultural favs like Furikake Salmon.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Smokey and the Slamwich
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Arkansas State Fair for the hometown hero, the Arkansas Slamwich, the Stuffed Thanksgiving Taco and more.

programme.desc: The SEC has a run of seven straight national titles, and nine in 12 years. Expansion in 2012 gives the conference 14 schools. Meanwhile, Nick Saban arguably becomes the greatest coach in the history of college football.

programme.title: Marrying Millions: Mother's Point of View
programme.desc: Bill is in the dog house after a disastrous dinner with Bri's parents, so to make things right he surprises Bri with a magical trip to reconnect.

programme.title: Movie: Killer in the Guest House
programme.desc: A woman is forced to rent out her guest house as a means of paying the mortgage, but her new tenant turns out to be a dangerous and womanizing con-man.

programme.title: Movie: Nanny Killer
programme.desc: A hardworking student takes a well-paying summer job as nanny at a winery to offset tuition expenses. But she soon realizes something is 'off' with the children she cares for when their mischievous pranks lead to deadly consequences.

programme.title: Movie: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: After being raped by an acquaintance, a young woman discovers she's pregnant and must fight for custody of her daughter.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

An exclusive and updated insider's account of the World Trade Center attacks on September 11, 2001. The broadcast will include information throughout the program about how viewers can contribute to the Uniformed Firefighters Association Scholarship Fund.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Brew
programme.desc: When the head of the Coors Brewing Company is kidnapped and held for ransom, it kicked off one of the most intense manhunts in American history. See how forensic science helped track down the kidnappers.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Message in a Bottle
programme.desc: When an attractive young Missouri woman is found dead in her apartment, police meticulously generate a suspect list a mile long. The culprit turns out to be the most unlikely suspect with an insatiable lust for power and control.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: Summer Of Terror (Part 1)
programme.desc: The summer of 1985 was one of the hottest Los Angeles had seen in a century. But terrified residents weren't sleeping with the windows open, they weren't sleeping at all. A killer was on the loose. He was the Night Stalker.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Night Stalker: I WIll Be Avenged (Part 2)
programme.desc: A tip from a teenage boy leads to the identity of the Night Stalker. Twenty-four hours later a mob of angry citizens track him down and capture him.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: The Murder Capital Of The World (Part 1)
programme.desc: A frantic public, desperate for answers, live in terror, waiting for the man they dubbed 'The Co-Ed Killer' to strike again. But no one could have expected that the person responsible, a local man, Edmund Kemper, was living among them.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Co-Ed Killer: Thinking Murder All Day Long (Part 2)
programme.desc: In April 1973, 24-year-old Edmund Kemper had murdered six coeds in and around the city of Santa Cruz, California, shaking the community to its core.

programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.desc: From 1979 to 1981, more than two dozen of Atlanta’s black children, mostly boys and young men, disappeared without a trace. Someone was killing the city's most vulnerable children for an unknown reason.

programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Snow Blind
programme.desc: The clock ticks as an impending, violent arctic storm the Siberian Express gathers strength. Shawn can't quit the gold. Kris gambles on another rookie miner. Emily finds gold but her equipment fails. Vernon risks everything to test Claim 16.

programme.title: Bering Sea Gold: Pain in the Ice

programme.title: 9/ 11 Firehouse
