programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripteased
programme.desc: Find out what prop Q asked to keep from the dental damn challenge, what glazed delight is known to give Joe great power and how a doctor's appointment inspired Murr's striptease punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party Show 7

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Controversies and Legacies
programme.desc: Kim's decision to try for a third child proves to be a matter of life and death. Meanwhile Kendall fears backlash from supporting stricter gun control, and Kris gets emotional upon recognizing her mom won't be around forever.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: No Good Deeds
programme.desc: With Rob's baby only a month away, the family is excited to celebrate and go all out to plan a baby shower for the couple, but, when Rob and Chyna get into a fight, the party is ruined.

programme.title: Movie: Speed

programme.title: Movie: Speed
programme.desc: A mad bomber rigs an L.A. bus to blow if it drops below 50 m.p.h. and a police officer must rescue the commuters trapped inside.

programme.title: 10 Things You Don't Know: Keanu Reeves
programme.desc: The most unbelievable, surprising, and OMG things about Keanu Reeves from the story behind his famous name to where all of his Matrix money went.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Lord and His Lady
programme.desc: Inspired by the March for Our Lives demonstration, Kim meets with the survivors of the Parkland shooting to learn about their movement. Meanwhile, Scott revives his podcast with Khloé in Cleveland, and Kylie feels insecure about her post-baby body.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: The Betrayal
programme.desc: Khloé is blindsided by some devastating news about her relationship just days before her due date. Meanwhile, Kim worries that Khloe's delivery will fall on the day of her high school reunion, and Scott and Kendall team up to do some extreme sports.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: True Story
programme.desc: The family rushes to Cleveland to be by Khloé's side while she gives birth and comes face to face with Tristan for the first time since news of his infidelity broke. Kim reconnects with old friends at her 20-year high school reunion.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Vegas, Baby!
programme.desc: Khloé and Tristan head back to LA with baby True. Unresolved tension lingers between Kim and Tristan due to his infidelity. Kourtney travels to DC to talk with Congress. Kim heads to Vegas with her girlfriends prove she's still a wild girl.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Stacking the Deck
programme.desc: Kim returns to Paris for the first time since the robbery. Meanwhile Kourtney fears she waited too long to freeze her eggs, and Kendall worries she'll humiliate herself in a charity poker tournament.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Chicago Loyalty
programme.desc: Kim's fierce loyalty to her husband becomes a source of conflict while on a trip to Chicago. Kourtney struggles with anxiety in the aftermath of her breakup, so her sisters decide to plan a girls trip to Palm Springs to cure her breakup blues.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Kourtney's Choice
programme.desc: Kim plans a trip to New York for her husband's appearance on SNL to show Kourtney how far Scott has come as a family man. At the same time, Kim contemplates an unexpected move to Chicago, and Kris fears her mother might be seriously ill.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Eat Pray Fight
programme.desc: The family heads to Bali for a relaxing vacation, but tensions flare when Kourtney accuses Khloe of complaining too much. Scott tries to find buried treasure and enlists the help of his kids. In LA, Kendall and Kylie help their mom care for MJ.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Soul(mate) Searching
programme.desc: While on a spiritual quest to find balance in Bali, Kourtney gets some news that makes her consider a future with Scott. Kim and Khloe are determined to have an insightful psychic reading but get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Legally Brunette
programme.desc: Kim decides to follow in her father's footsteps and pursue her lifelong dream of becoming a lawyer, but worries she may have taken on more than she can handle.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Pet Peeve
programme.desc: Khloe’s mistrust of her mother’s boyfriend, Corey, resurfaces on a very awkward family trip to Palm Springs, leaving Kris hurt and confused about her daughter’s behavior. Meanwhile, the family stays with Kendall to escape the fires.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Unhappy Camper
programme.desc: Determined to fulfil one of North's lifelong dreams, Kim puts her survival skills to the test on an overnight camping trip in the wilderness. Malika heads back to Cleveland for the first time since True's birth and suspects Khloe is struggling internally.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Heavy Meddle
programme.desc: Khole tries to mediate a fight between Kourtney and Kendall but only makes things worse. Meanwhile Kris makes herself at home in Kylie's new office space, so Kylie must show her mom who's boss.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Movie: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre named Shrek finds his swamp home overrun with exiled fairytale creatures, including a talkative companion named Donkey. Shrek strikes a deal: he will get his swamp back if he rescues Princess Fiona and brings her to the scheming Lord Farquaad.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Surf and Turf
programme.desc: It's a mix of land and sea as Guy Fieri pops into a few favourite spots across the country. In Portland, Ore., a chef full of personality is still making people smile with seafood for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Asia, Africa And India
programme.desc: Guy's going international with flavors from Asia, Africa and India. In Los Angeles, a funky fast Filipino joint spicin' up house-made hot dogs and piling pork adobo onto grilled cheese.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Top Ten Burgers
programme.desc: Guy's had a lot of burgers on DDD and we asked you to vote for your Top 10 favourites of all time. From old school to gourmet, it's a countdown of the most creative and delicious combinations found in Flavortown.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Their Own Way
programme.desc: Guy meets cooks doing things their own way in Flagstaff Arizona.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Off the Beaten Path
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's taking a detour to find some not-your-everyday eats. In Richmond, Va., a jammin' Jamaican joint serving outrageous oxtail and fried chicken with true island flavour.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sweet, Savory and Saucy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's taste buds are in for a culinary adventure. In Bakersfield, Calif., the classic cafe dishing out meaty Texas chili and decadent pumpkin pancakes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Buns and Bagels
programme.desc: Guy's picking up everything from burgers to buns and bagels. In Portsmouth, New Hampshire, an amped up deli serves lights-out lamb burgers and righteous ribs. In Los Angeles, a Koreatown favourite loads up Asian buns and has a unique bacon-corn bar dish.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Global Comes Local
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son Hunter cook up some Triple-D style takeout with four chefs over video chat. There's authentic Mexican from Phoenix, kolaches from Salt Lake City, Baltimore pit beef and pork belly all the way from Maui.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef, Lamb And Pig
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going for all kinds of meaty favourites. In Louisville, Kentucky, a real-deal Irish pub serves up cottage pie and a lamb-cabbage specialty. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky spot puts out flavourful Asian-barbecue fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handy Helpings
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a fistful of righteous hand-held toppings starting with a kolach cafe in Salt Lake City cooking up their Czech specialties with some sweetness and comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Like Mama Made
programme.desc: Guy travels to St. Louis where a former backup singer is serving old school soul food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Legacies
programme.desc: Guy Fieri looks into some classic restaurant favourites in America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Global Comes Local
programme.desc: Guy Fieri and his son Hunter cook up some Triple-D style takeout with four chefs over video chat. There's authentic Mexican from Phoenix, kolaches from Salt Lake City, Baltimore pit beef and pork belly all the way from Maui.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Great Gear
programme.desc: Guy's grabbing grub cooked up with some great gear. In San Francisco, a place firin' up lights-out lamb and huge pork biscuits in some of the city's last remaining indoor smokers.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Worldwide Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy starts this trip in Cincinnati at a Jamaican joint firing up their trademark jerk chicken and spicy snapper. Then, he stops ion Boston at a lunch place that is serving up authentic Italian.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Piling on the Pork
programme.desc: Guy is digging in and pigging out on this trip starting with a Puerto Rican spot in San Antonio that's building a unique take on nachos and cooking up a monster chop. In New Orleans, a gangster grill serves up pork knuckles and some sweet bird.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Spaetzle and Sticky Wings
programme.desc: Guy's caught up in a whirlwind of flavors when he visits Norfolk, Virginia. A two-for-one spot where a bomb butcher stacks sandwiches by day and a chef firing up ramen and sticky wings takes over at night.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sicilian and Seafood
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from incredible Italian to sensational seafood. In Oklahoma City, a funky food truck putting out wood-fired pizza and grandma's Sicilian meatball recipe.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Stuffed and Twisted
programme.desc: Guy is checking out funky foods from coast to coast. In Monterey California, the second generation Italian place is serving mom's recipes like meaty lasagne and minestrone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Meatballs To Lollipops
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the local watering hole putting' a unique spin on standard bar food with the loaded chimi burrito and lobster lollipops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Diners Times Three
programme.desc: East coast diner meets Vietnamese cooking in Santa Cruz.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: And the Kicker Is
programme.desc: Guy Fieri visits a restaurant in Columbia with homemade patties, a corner store in Buffalo serving everything with a side of homemade bread and a diner that's redefining scrapple in Berkeley.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Comfort Food, Quick
programme.desc: Rachael skips the fuss of making a traditional chicken pot pie by whipping up her easy, stove-top version in half the time. She tops it with golden pieces of puff pastry for a fast and pretty finish to this bowl of comfort.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Quick and Easy Movie Night
programme.desc: Valerie's quick and easy menu, perfect for a backyard viewing party under the stars, includes crab boil sliders, s'mores popcorn, lemon Dijon potato salad and homemade limeade and minto soda.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Timesaving Tips
programme.desc: The Kitchen is sharing some timesaving tips and tricks for meals packed with flavour. Sunny Anderson kicks things off with her ravioli stroganoff and Jeff Mauro contributes his Cuban slider bake.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Food, Fast!
programme.desc: Trisha invites pro racer Danica Patrick to make a pit stop in her kitchen. Trisha starts the day with recipes that are quick and easy to make, like a Cubano Sandwich with Quick Pickles, Pressure Cooker Potatoes with Smoky Aioli, Three Bean Salad and more.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Bangin' Breakfast, Killer Brunch!
programme.desc: Molly shares her favourite breakfast and brunch recipes including fluffy blintzes with lemon ricotta filling, flaky bacon, egg and cheese turnovers, raspberry and pistachio pastry pockets and a loaded bagel salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home 15
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is making quick family meals at home on the ranch. There's Pork Marsala with Mushrooms and a gorgeous Grilled Shrimp Panzanella. Plus, Ree makes Spinach Artichoke Calzones and shortcut Creamy Tortellini Soup, a real 10-minute wonder.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is exploring 16-minute marvels with four awesome weeknight dinners cooked against the clock. She makes pork schnitzel sandwiches topped with warm red cabbage followed by a snappy Italian sausage pasta skillet.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Simple Speedy Dishes
programme.desc: The Kitchen shares their favourite recipes that are fast and flavourful. Katie Lee begins with a quick, easy way to make a classic with her grilled chicken parmesan and Alex Guarnaschelli shares a simple pork, tofu and vegetable stir fry.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Lowcountry Lunch
programme.desc: Kardea Brown invites a friend over to sit by the creek, share a great meal and watch the world go by. Her menu includes a Seafood Salad Roll with Charleston Shrimp and Blue Crab, Homemade Seasoned Chips and Creekside Custard Cups.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Fearless Food
programme.desc: Ina Garten is tackling daunting dishes with easy techniques, from a perfectly risen souffle a l'orange to overcoming pastry fears with her totally professional-looking Anna's tomato tart.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Married with Kitchen
programme.desc: Most married couples consider their kids their babies, but these couples also consider their restaurants their babies. Guy Fieri puts their culinary skills -- and relationships -- to the test.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Dessert Games
programme.desc: Everyone knows Guy's all about savory, but Buddy Valastro, the Cake Boss himself, convinced Guy to declare it Dessert Day in Flavortown Market.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: The Weighting Game
programme.desc: In the first game, the chefs try not to tip the scale when shopping for their best meat dish. It's a grocery gamble in game two when the chefs prepare an all-American lunch determined by the Food Wheel.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: James Beard Nominees on Triple G
programme.desc: Four James Beard-nominated chefs use their exceptional culinary skills to make an hors d'oeuvre featuring instant ramen noodles. Then, these high-end chefs have to make a five star seafood dinner with a ridiculously low budget.

programme.title: The Zoo: The Eagle Has Landed

programme.title: The Zoo: A Warthog Named Peaches
programme.desc: Peaches, a two-month-old warthog, charms his keepers while training to become an animal ambassador. A nervous one-horned rhino adjusts to her new exhibit. Plus, Willow, a red panda, shows signs of being pregnant.

programme.title: The Zoo: Baby Bunnies, Big World
programme.desc: Crate training Nikita the Amur tiger in preparation for her move to Washington, DC proves challenging. An endangered Chinese alligator shows signs of being pregnant. Plus, staff prepare to release rare New England cottontail rabbits into the wild.

programme.title: The Zoo: Giraffe in the City
programme.desc: A sweet giraffe named Mashengo journeys from the Indiana Zoo to his new home in the Bronx. Keepers hand-raise endangered ducklings and release them onto the duck pond at the Central Park Children's Zoo. Plus, love is in the air for a pair of cloud rats.

programme.title: The Zoo: Mending Willow
programme.desc: One team tests the problem solving skills of lions against those of snow leopards. Willow, a young red panda, is having mysterious foot problems. Also, the bird department anxiously awaits the gender reveal of two new adjutant stork chicks.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Yeti and the Cubs
programme.desc: There will be no peace in the world for the hamadryas baboons until Impo finds his mate. Luckily, the San Diego Zoo keepers have a plan. Two young cheetah cubs are training to become animal ambassadors with the help of their experienced canine guide.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Panda-monium

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Penguin Chick Swim School
programme.desc: Safari Park keepers say goodbye to two elephant brothers. We find out if the San Diego Zoo vets can design a custom shoe for Felix, an excitable three-toed baird's tapir. Then, two African Penguin chicks grow up and get ready to join the colony.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf
programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Water Under The Dock
programme.desc: Destiny organizes a square dance to raise money to clean up Lake Kikiwaka and invites Noah's arch-acting rival, Austin Justin. Meanwhile, Lou and Finn offer Matteo advice after learning he wants to ask Gwen to dance.

programme.title: Jessie: Trashin' Fashion

programme.title: Raven's Home: Crewed Up
programme.desc: When Levi starts hanging out with a new group of friends, Booker has a vision that leads him to believe that they're up to no good and tries to steer Levi away from them.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Sorry to Father You
programme.desc: When Raven and Chelsea go on a weekend getaway to celebrate the anniversary of their friendship, the kids are left at home in the care of both Devon and Garrett.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Video-A-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv and her band mates are stumped and can't agree on a theme for their new music video. They enlist Parker to shoot the video with his new camera and Diggie enthusiastically signs on to join his crew.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Gone Girl

programme.desc: Emma and Xander are teamed up for the fishing competition and realize they have nothing in common. Zuri and Tiffany decide to steal their fish from the mess hall.

programme.desc: Marie Singleton was a single mom who fell hard for Andre Jackson, a single dad raising his two kids. The couple married and seemed happy. Then Marie vanished and investigators discovered secrets. Was her disappearance related to her undercover job?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Intent
programme.desc: Connie and Larry Hoagland built a life centered on faith and family. Then, a vicious attack threatened it all. Someone wanted Connie dead. But who? After a bomb exploded underneath her car, secrets started to emerge.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly House of Cards
programme.desc: After Johnny Altinger vanished, the trail of clues led investigators to a young director. Detectives worried that the case was a hoax staged by a master storyteller. Turns out, the script was darker than anyone knew.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Deadly Ally
programme.desc: A land developer disappears into the Arizona desert, and a brother sets out to uncover the truth. But when hikers stumble onto a gruesome discovery, investigators quickly realize no one can be trusted when they find themselves in the line of fire.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: The House on Canyon Road
programme.desc: The gruesome discovery of a skeletonized and dismembered corpse buried in the backyard of a Seattle home results in an investigation that unravels a 30-year-old murder plot hatched by a scheming, vindictive family.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly House of Cards
programme.desc: After Johnny Altinger vanished, the trail of clues led investigators to a young director. Detectives worried that the case was a hoax staged by a master storyteller. Turns out, the script was darker than anyone knew.

programme.title: Snapped: Kim Parker
programme.desc: When a young Marine goes missing, police uncover his troubled marriage and a deadly plot.

programme.title: Snapped: Bernadette Perusquia
programme.desc: A school nurse pulls the trigger; was it self-defence or did she commit murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Catherine Hamborsky
programme.desc: A mysterious bar fire reveals a murder and one woman’s desperation to cover up her secret addiction.

programme.title: Snapped: Tracy Lawson
programme.desc: After a deadly fight, a mother’s secrets are exposed but she has a few surprises for the jury.

programme.title: Snapped: Vonlee Nicole Titlow
programme.desc: After an alcoholic millionaire dies of seemingly natural causes, an unexpected betrayal reveals there may be more to the victim's death, and to his beautiful party-girl niece, than first meets the eye.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Secrets in the Snow
programme.desc: She was a dancer who married a dashing photographer. They seemed to have the picture-perfect life until the bone-chilling night she disappeared. In a case filled with twists, could the victim help solve her own murder?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Night Hannah Hill Disappeared
programme.desc: A former homecoming queen taking her first steps into adult life is brutally murdered. Who would want to harm her? The investigation centered on two men and a mysterious black bag that seemed to come out of nowhere.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Inside Man
programme.desc: A smooth convict was offered a deal as tempting as it was dangerous: get key information from a suspected serial killer to win your freedom. The catch; he'd have to go undercover in a psychiatric prison with no guarantee of getting out alive.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Family Affair
programme.desc: When the wealthy heir to a legendary hotel is murdered, the list of possible suspects is long. He had his share of enemies, and a complicated family. Investigators soon learned someone close to the victim was also in danger.

programme.title: License to Kill: Prescription for Murder
programme.desc: In the midst of the emerging opioid epidemic, investigators in Los Angeles look into a cluster of mysterious overdose deaths of young men in their 20's and discover a Doctor who uses her prescription pad to line her pockets and kill her patients.

programme.title: Snapped: Diane Staudte
programme.desc: They say deaths come in three, but when a young woman falls ill after eerily similar deaths of her father and brother, suspicion turns to a family member and the limits of a mother’s love.

programme.title: Snapped: Lisa Graham
programme.desc: In a shocking turn of events, a mother must face her demons when her daughter is left for dead after a vicious murder.

programme.title: Snapped: Rebecca Fenton
programme.desc: A woman finds her husband dead and proclaims her innocence, but questions about his wealth, a suspicious fire and her scandalous past raise red flags.

programme.title: Snapped: Kwaneta Harris
programme.desc: A foreclosure leads police to a concrete grave and a twisted plot of deception, fraud and murder, as one woman goes to extraordinary lengths to avoid justice.

programme.title: Snapped: Martha Ann McClancy
programme.desc: A churchgoing southern woman loses her husband to tragedy, but a cloud of suspicion haunts her new marriage and leads investigators to a new conclusion.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandra Barajas
programme.desc: A violent home invasion leads to suspicion about the victim's stepdaughter and a mystery man, but a startling confession reveals a more intimate betrayal.

programme.title: Movie: Angry Birds
programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Holidays of Future Passed
programme.desc: The Simpsons flash forward 30 years and find themselves in a tech-savvy, futuristic Springfield. Bart and Lisa have children of their own and decide to spend the holidays as one big family at Homer and Marge's house.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Politically Inept With Homer Simpson
programme.desc: Homer lands his own political talk show after a video featuring his impassioned rant on poor treatment at the airport goes viral. As his talk show quickly gains popularity nationwide, Homer becomes the spokesperson for the Gravy Movement.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The D'oh-cial Network
programme.desc: As the mastermind behind the online social networking phenomenon 'SpringFace,' Lisa is called to trial when Springfield's obsession with the site becomes chaotic and dysfunctional.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Goes From Rags to Riches

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Daughter Also Rises
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa's mother-daughter Valentine's Day plans change when Lisa meets an intellectual romantic who shares her passion for culture, history and literature.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Exit Through the Kwik-E-Mart
programme.desc: In order to get even with his dad, Bart goes undercover as a street graffiti artist and plasters Homer's unflattering image all over Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How I Wet Your Mother
programme.desc: Karma gets the best of Homer after he gets his friends in trouble, and as a result, his bedwetting problem worsens. The family tries to infiltrate his dreams to search for clues in his subconscious to determine the source of his problem.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Totally Fun Thing Bart Will Never Do Again
programme.desc: When Bart sees a commercial for the ultimate cruise, he begs his parents for a family vacation. Low on cash, the only way they can go is if each family member sells one valuable item.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Spy Who Learned Me
programme.desc: Marge becomes upset when Homer blurts out embarrassing remarks throughout a movie. After Homer suffers a concussion on the job, he seeks help during his time off to learn how to become a better husband.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Ned 'N' Edna's Blend
programme.desc: When the town of Springfield learns that Ned and Edna secretly got hitched, Marge offers to throw them a congratulatory reception.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Roller? I Hardly Knew Her?

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: What About Blob?
programme.desc: Gene convinces Tina and Louise to help him save a misunderstood plankton blob from being destroyed by a yacht club.

programme.desc: In search of Stewie's cherished big wheel tricycle, that Peter threw out, Stewie and Brian embark on an adventure to 'Garbage Island,' a giant floating mass of trash out in the sea. Meanwhile, Lois tries to help Quagmire elevate his dating game.

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please

programme.desc: When Scrat accidentally sets of a chain of events that cause a meteor storm to head toward Earth, it is up to the old gang to save the planet. Sid, Manny, and Diego go on an epic adventure to find clues to stop the meteor and save the world.

programme.title: Movie: Angry Birds
programme.desc: An island of happy, flightless birds is visited by a ship of mysterious green pigs, led by Leonard. Red, a bird with anger problems, doesn't trust them, but he is ignored. When their eggs go missing, it is up to Red and his friends to get them back.

programme.title: Movie: Alpha

programme.desc: Rocky Balboa is a small time boxer longing for the chance to prove to the world how great he can be. When he finally gets the chance to fight the heavyweight champion Apollo Creed in an exhibition match, he sees it as his only chance to make it big.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky II
programme.desc: In the aftermath of his infamous match with Apollo Creed, Rocky plans to settle down with the love of his life and start a family. He soon finds himself out of money, however, and has no choice but to accept Apollo's offer of a rematch.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky III
programme.desc: Three years after beating Apollo Creed, with whom he has become great friends, Balboa loses his title to Clubber Lang, who inadvertently causes the death of Mickey. Apollo helps Rocky train for a rematch against Lang so he can win the title back.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky IV
programme.desc: When Rocky's old friend Apollo Creed is killed during a fight with a super-fit Russian boxer, Ivan Drago, Rocky blames himself. Rocky arranges to fight Ivan in Russia.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky V
programme.desc: Suddenly bankrupt and forced into retirement by debilitating boxing injuries, Rocky Balboa returns to his Philadelphia roots and decides to coach a young and talented but arrogant protege.

programme.title: Movie: Rocky III
programme.desc: Three years after beating Apollo Creed, with whom he has become great friends, Balboa loses his title to Clubber Lang, who inadvertently causes the death of Mickey. Apollo helps Rocky train for a rematch against Lang so he can win the title back.

programme.title: Weird Wonders

programme.title: Weird Wonders

programme.title: Weird Wonders

programme.title: Weird Wonders
programme.desc: Oil rig workers capture an eerie creature in the Gulf of Mexico on video, and blobs are washing up around the world leaving experts perplexed.

programme.title: Weird Wonders

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Curse of the Zombie Graveyard

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Church of the Death Eaters
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a swam of millions of strange creatures invading a church, some wonder if it's evidence of a grisly secret buried in the ground below. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate the threat this insect army poses.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.desc: What appears to be a three foot tall humanoid is caught on tape in the Indonesian jungle, some speculate to be evidence of a human species that disappeared thousands of years ago.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: When Bigfoot Attacks

programme.desc: A young mother turns to the internet desperate for help and advice when her young son mysteriously falls ill.

programme.title: Game of Deception
programme.desc: Danger lurks when a 14-year-old boy becomes enamoured with the world of online gaming.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Brides and Murder
programme.desc: Two young brides-to-be are just beginning to plan their weddings when their dreams are tragically cut short. Find out if the desperate calls made to 911 reveal the truth about their shocking deaths.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: The Gone Girls

programme.title: Game of Deception
programme.desc: Danger lurks when a 14-year-old boy becomes enamoured with the world of online gaming.

programme.title: Disappeared: Edge of Fourteen
programme.desc: Ashley Summers is a fun-loving 14-year-old. When she vanishes on July 4th, her family is at a loss. The mystery deepens when the FBI connects her case to two other young women missing from her neighborhood. Ten years later, there's still no answer.

programme.title: Disappeared: Last Stop
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Tabitha Tuders vanishes walking to her bus stop in Nashville, TN. Police think she's a runaway but it appears that there are disturbing circumstances behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Disappeared: Every Mother's Son
programme.desc: 20-year old Bear Diaz has diabetes, leaving him weak and vulnerable. When he vanishes in the night with his TV, backpack and cash, investigators must consider foul play. Then Skylar Tosic disappears, leaving people wondering if the cases are linked.

programme.title: Disappeared: Love Triangle
programme.desc: Waitress Brandy Hanna leaves work Friday afternoon for a weekend off. But Monday morning, when she doesn't show up for work, her mother is convinced Brandy is in trouble.

programme.title: Disappeared: Last Stop
programme.desc: Thirteen-year-old Tabitha Tuders vanishes walking to her bus stop in Nashville, TN. Police think she's a runaway but it appears that there are disturbing circumstances behind her disappearance.

programme.title: Home Alone: Bullets in the Basement
programme.desc: Single mom Erin installs a security system when she realizes that someone's been inside her home. But that doesn't stop the intruder from breaking in, determined to end her life as well as his own.

programme.title: Home Alone: Silent Night, Holy Terror
programme.desc: In Alabama in 2010, sassy teenager Haley craves her independence, but her protective mom, Teresa, worries about the company she's keeping. Teresa convinces Haley to end her toxic relationship, but he won't let go until he gets what he wants.

programme.title: Home Alone: Demons of the Past
programme.desc: In desolate, isolated Nebraska in 2014, Valerie and her loving adopted son Nathan are starting a new chapter of their lives when a knock at the door one night brings back demons of the past.

programme.title: Home Alone: Behind the Shower Curtain
programme.desc: Catherine thinks that dumping her boyfriend will solve her problems, but when he breaks into her home intending to kill her, he takes her family hostage.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Never Predicted
programme.desc: When Andrea Farrington meets fellow employee Alex Kozak she thinks that romance could be on the horizon. She has no idea that feelings of romance will be replaced by suspicion and fear, leading to a final rejection that has fatal consequences.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: Almost Home
programme.desc: Gayle Isleib was shot on April 30, 1996. Police identify a co-worker, Tyronne Montgomery. Evidence is found of stalking, plans to kidnap Gayle, murder her husband and love poems to Gayle. Tyrone Montgomery was convicted of 1st degree Murder.

programme.title: The Killer Beside Me: The Evil Inside
programme.desc: At work, Kerri Harris and her friend discover a camera secreted in the ladies' restroom. Police examine the evidence, but less than 24 hours into their investigation, Kerri is found stabbed to death in her office. Her co-workers are just feet away.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Cabin in the Woods
programme.desc: Sandra never expected such extreme reprisals from Norman, a man she once called her partner. But when her daughter is caught in the crosshairs, no one can predict how far Norman will go.

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Reagan's Secret Weapon

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty
programme.desc: With testimony from those directly involved, the de-classified truth of the 15-year manhunt for Osama bin Laden is revealed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: 9/11: The Falling Man: 9/11: The Falling Man
programme.desc: The story of the unforgettable photograph of a 9/11 'jumper.' It follows the trail of the photographer who nearly lost his life shooting the image and a journalist who committed himself to uncovering the falling man's identity.

programme.title: 9/11: As We Watched
programme.desc: The story of that day through the unflinching eye of ABC News, as the network's anchors and reporters rushed to the scenes of chaos and embarked on what would become an extraordinary 83 hours of live coverage.

programme.title: Capturing Bin Laden
programme.desc: Capturing bin Laden tracks the rise and fall of Osama bin Laden, a man who spent the decade following the September 11 attacks at the top of America's most wanted list.

programme.title: 9/11: The Falling Man: 9/11: The Falling Man
programme.desc: The story of the unforgettable photograph of a 9/11 'jumper.' It follows the trail of the photographer who nearly lost his life shooting the image and a journalist who committed himself to uncovering the falling man's identity.

programme.title: CIA Declassified: The Real Zero Dark Thirty

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Island Warfare
programme.desc: By the summer of 1942, the US has the upper hand in the war with Japan. It has achieved naval superiority. In the spring of 1945 the loss of life is great for both sides but Japan refuses to surrender. US Chiefs desperately look for a way to end the way.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: No Surrender
programme.desc: The war is turning America's way. Yet Japan is determined to kill as many Americans as possible and fight to the death. The US must determine if it has the stomach for the fight, or if there is a secret weapon that offers a quick way out.

programme.title: Supernatural Nazis
programme.desc: The story of Allied Germanic heroes found in an abandoned salt mine.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, with the Bowery Boys as rivals.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields versus the McCoys is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Devil Incarnate
programme.desc: Born in Honduras, Juan Ramon Matta Ballesteros became one of the richest cocaine smugglers in history. Ballesteros masterminded a supply route into the US, which fed much of the cocaine and crack epidemic of the 70's and 80's.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Six Weeks For Two A-Frames
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Cabin Masters to the Rescue
programme.desc: In the lush woods of Manchester, Maine sits 97 acres of pristine land that was recently inherited by Gary and his wife Ellen.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: The Shaw Camp Re-Imagination
programme.desc: Following a two-year search, Greg and Denise uncovered their 'diamond in the rough' when they purchased a cabin that was untouched for years on the beautiful shore of Messalonskee Lake in Sidney.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship: Hole-y Hedgehogs
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli and Duff Goldman challenge the five young bakers to each make a poke cake with fillings such as pureed fruit or pudding.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Cajun Cuisine
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases 15 of America's best Cajun dishes, from classics like crawfish, jambalaya and gumbo to a few surprises.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fire Trucks

programme.desc: Roger visits the Jack Mountain Bushcraft School in Masardis, Maine where the owner and wilderness guide Tim Smith teaches him how to create a rustic kitchen outdoors.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fireplace Feasts
programme.desc: Roger loves cooking in a fireplace. He visits two places in New England that host fireplace feasts.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Playing With Fire in New England

programme.title: Good Eats: Rich Little Poor Boy

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Icing Man Cometh

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: A Chuck for Chuck: The Reload

programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: The Tiger Attack (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 2003, the wildly successful careers of master illusionists Siegfried & Roy comes to a shockingly abrupt end when one of the team’s prized tigers bites Roy Horn on the neck and drags him offstage.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: Dangerous Illusion (Part 2)
programme.desc: Roy tries to recover from severe wounds inflicted by his beloved tiger Mantacore, but the team’s excuses for the animal’s behavior lose credibility upon further investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Critical Manoeuvre
programme.desc: A truck driver claims the life of a high school football standout and flees the scene. Fortunately, a trace evidence expert examines paint particles found near the accident and leads investigators to the man behind the wheel.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Day the Music Died
programme.desc: When grunge singer Mia Zapata was gruesomely murdered, police were at a loss to track down her killer. But thanks to evidence collected by a forethoughtful medical examiner, police were able to catch the killer more than a decade after the fact.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder on the Menu
programme.desc: When a Philadelphia restaurateur is murdered, the police sift through the usual suspects to find his killer. They soon uncover a sprawling web of deceit and debt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hot on the Trail
programme.desc: Investigators get involved after a serial arsonist begins starting blazes all over Washington DC.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Screen Pass
programme.desc: A Colorado teen goes missing and the community bands together to find her. When her body is found nearly two years later, the investigation quickly switches from missing to murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.desc: The key suspect in the murder of young women in Yosemite National Park is caught, but it’s up to an exceptionally skilled FBI agent to dismantle his web of lies and denials to draw a confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: High n' Dry
programme.desc: A unique application of forensic science gives investigators a different explanation for a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: To the Viktor
programme.desc: Three homicides on two continents looked like professional executions. Investigators on both sides of the Atlantic needed to find out if they were related.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dog Day Afternoon
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her Florida home, and evidence at the scene is scarce. All signs point to burglary. The case goes cold until police get a tip from a canine behaviorist who points them in a different direction.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Bug Breeder
programme.desc: Mike gets dirty with some fainting goats, breeding exotic insects, while helping to remove tree stumps. Mike decides to take on the dirty jobs that other do day in and day out.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Poo Pot Maker
programme.desc: Just when Mike thought he had seen it all, he is hired at a cow farm that specializes in making gardening pots out of cattle poop. Mike later opens up the mailbag and answers a viewer's question on a segment where Mike is bitten by a snake.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Mule Logger
programme.desc: Mike teams up with a master-cooper, also known as a barrel maker, and attempts to master the art of toasting the inside of barrels over an open flame. It is the toasting that gives the wine a special flavor while it ferments.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Well Digger
programme.desc: After joining the Bowie BaySox team as a groundskeeper, Mike joins the Watson Water Company and digs through mud, rock, gravel, sand and water as they drill for heating and water in Tennessee.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Cave Digger
programme.desc: Mike helps dig tunnels that are used as underground wine caverns. Then Mike travels to the airport where he does the dirty jobs behind the scenes.

programme.title: I Quit: Picking Up the Pieces
programme.desc: With $100k looming near, the entrepreneurs aim to prove that they can successfully grow their businesses. But disagreements between partners explode, leading to frayed relationships, risky investments and shattered expectations.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Salt Miner
programme.desc: Mike goes underground packing explosives into a wall of salt and blowing it up in order to break up the salt into small blocks. Mike masters the dirty job of salt mining and gets a new respect for the people who get dirty so the public can have salt.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Shark Researcher
programme.desc: Mike Rowe braves shark-infested waters off the coast of Massachusetts as he lends a hand to shark biologist Greg Skomal.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Sewer Inspector
programme.desc: Mike joins a sewer inspector on patrol, braving the cockroach and rat-infested sewers of San Francisco. Then he helps a disaster clean-up crew after a Brooklyn toilet explodes from sewer backup and does some backbreaking work at a demolition company.

programme.title: I Quit: Picking Up the Pieces
programme.desc: With $100k looming near, the entrepreneurs aim to prove that they can successfully grow their businesses. But disagreements between partners explode, leading to frayed relationships, risky investments and shattered expectations.

programme.title: Dirty Jobs: Pig Farmer
programme.desc: Mike Rowe faces the challenges of feeding and cleaning up after hundreds of dirty pigs. Then, he learns how to care for a new litter of piglets, and artificially inseminates a female pig.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Safer at Home-stead
programme.desc: The Raney family turns cameras on themselves as they shelter in place on their Alaskan homestead. When a moose kill is discovered dangerously close to their cabin, Marty attempts to track the predators.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Home Sweet Homestead: Cold Hard Lockdown
programme.desc: The intense winter has frozen the water supply on the homestead, forcing Marty to hunt for a new water source. In Hawaii, Matt and his wife Katie self-film a lesson in Cacao harvesting on her family's plantation.

programme.title: Auction Kings: Hot Air Balloon/ Woolly Mammoth Tusk
programme.desc: Owner Paul Brown and the Gallery 63 team prepare for their next auction, which includes a Wooly Mammoth tusk and a giant sapphire. Manager Cindy faces her fears and goes up in a hot air balloon with Paul and their client who is selling it.

programme.title: Local Knowledge: KW Bottom Fishing
programme.desc: In Key West, Rush and Ali wait for the right conditions for their day of bottom fishing.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Lost and Found

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: U.S. Marines - Chad Shevlin
programme.desc: Chad Shevlin shares how he survived being hit in the face by a rocket-propelled grenade.

programme.title: Out Da Bayou: The Hatching
programme.desc: Collecting eggs from a coop can be an adrenaline rush for even hardcore outdoors people.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hudson Valley Retreat
programme.desc: Peter and Ashley Jensen build a sustainable straw bale panel house in the Hudson Valley, the first of its kind in the States. With only three months to work, the race against nature is as they attempt to finish before the East Coast winter sets in.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaii Dome House
programme.desc: A mother-and-son team pulls up stakes from the crowded confines of Orange County to build an off-grid family commune outside Keaau, Hawaii. With the help of a skilled aircrete instructor, the duo overcomes a learning curve to make their dreams come true.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountain Modern
programme.desc: A father-son duo builds an off-grid home in Montana's Flathead Valley. The 720-square-foot stick-frame home takes advantage of the mountain winds using a wind-turbine generator for power and features plenty of upcycled materials from the surrounding area.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Flathead Lake Pontoon
programme.desc: A Montana carpenter has big plans to build a unique pontoon houseboat so he can live on Flathead Lake year-round. As both a builder and artist, he has the skills to turn his vision into a reality but an early winter threatens the whole project.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: California Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Under House Arrest
programme.desc: Andrew and Gerrid return victorious from the moose hunt, uniting the band for the first time. But a sudden cold spell leads to a scramble to make winter shelters. Oliver's refusal to follow the group's plan leads to an explosive confrontation.

programme.title: 100 Days Wild: Zombie Fish Apocalypse

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Survival of the Idiots/ Dumped

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: One Coarse Meal/ Gary in Love
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. / Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Shell Games/ Senior Discount

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick's Coupon/ Out of the Picture

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spin the Bottle/ There's a Sponge in My Soup
programme.desc: Plankton poses as a wish-granting genie in his latest scheme to get the secret formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sanitation Insanity/ Bunny Hunt
programme.desc: When Mr. Krabs gets in trouble for littering, he makes SpongeBob and Squidward clean up Bikini Bottom. A sea bunny ravages Squidward's garden, but SpongeBob thinks it's cute.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spot Returns/ The Checkup
programme.desc: When his pet amoeba, Spot, has puppies, Plankton decides to use them in another of his nefarious plots. Mr. Krabs is too scared to get his physical, but if he doesn't pass, the Krusty Krab will be shut down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Patty Creature Feature/ Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Slumber Party/ Grooming Gary
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's enlists SpongeBob's help to be an undercover spy at Pearl's slumber party.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Face Freeze/ Glove World R.I.P
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick bet who can hold a 'funny face' the longest until their faces freeze that way.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Swamp Mates/ One Trick Sponge
programme.desc: Bubble Bass gets stranded with Patrick in a swamp looking for a lost action figure.

programme.title: The Loud House: Gown and Out/ Breaking Dad

programme.title: The Loud House: Ruthless People/ What Wood Lincoln Do?
programme.desc: When the house is infested with termites, half the family stays with Pop Pop and the others with Aunt Ruth.Lincoln has to complete a woodworking assignment but has a history of failure on the topic.

programme.title: World's Deadliest Weather: Adventures Gone Wrong

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Free the Highway

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Pull 'n Pray
programme.desc: Eric is working to find his place on the County/Coxon team when a T-bone semi collision spurs them into action. A blizzard sends Andrew on an urgent rescue mission.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: A Big Problem
programme.desc: An air ambulance takes off when a pileup results in serious casualties. A veteran operator rescues a leaning trailer.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Nerves of Steel
programme.desc: A whiteout pile-up scatters heavy I-beams across the highway, testing James and his crew; Kevin must lift a 20,000-pound chunk of steel off the road. Herb's crew stares down a huge mess and a marathon recovery in tough condition.

programme.title: Weather Gone Viral: The Wrath of Weather
programme.desc: A sleeping volcano erupts and sends hundreds running for their lives, more than a dozen elementary school students are the unknowing targets of a violent microburst, and window washing is always risky.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Wreck. Recover. Repeat.
programme.desc: Al Quiring races to recover a trailer and open the TransCanada before the morning rush. Jamie runs a race of his own when a semi carrying a load of pharmaceuticals plunges down a bank. In Alberta, the burdens of running the shop solo take a toll on Colin.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Ice Storm
programme.desc: A downpour of freezing rain covers Hope and the Coq in a thick layer of ice, cutting off communication and crippling Jamie's operations. Ken Monkhouse heads to a job up a remote, ice-covered hill and relives the worst day of his life.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: You Can't Argue With Gravity
programme.desc: Al and Gord from Quiring Towing rescue a loaded semi that's teetering on the edge of a 300-foot drop. When a new client needs Colin's help, he faces a white-knuckle drive on a remote Alberta back road. Jamie tests out a new driver.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: My Purpose Is to Protect
programme.desc: When Jamie and Jason Davis Heavy Recovery crews team up for a massive wreck, a close call forces Brandon to reconsider his future in the business. In Alberta, attempts to straighten out a jackknifed truck get twisted in unexpected directions.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Blood Moons and Mud Explosions
programme.desc: A Swiss mountain seems to be squirting out its insides. A moon with a halo appears and seems to trigger bizarre human behaviour. And glowing green geese are filmed flying over Canada.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Sky Rings and Flying Spiders
programme.desc: Are strange cloud rings, filmed in the sky over Siberia, linked to unexplained circles on the ice of a nearby lake? A seemingly solid light house is filmed wobbling precariously as it's battered by a storm.

programme.title: Weird Earth: Breathing Forests and Fizzing Fireballs
programme.desc: What is the huge fizzing fireball filmed crashing through a farmer's field? Why does a forest seem to be breathing? And a mysterious horizontal cloud puzzles Japanese airplane passengers.

programme.title: Hoarders: Mary Lynn
programme.desc: Mary Lynn's 14 year-old-son Jacob would rather be in foster care than live with his own mother in her hoarded house. He fabricated a story about his mother beating him as a means of getting CPS involved. If she doesn't progress, she could lose her son.

programme.title: Hoarders: Barbara/ Richard
programme.desc: Barbara has been a hoarder her entire life, but it spiralled out of control after the deaths of her two sons. Richard became a hoarder after his life went downhill.

programme.title: Hoarders: Carrie/ James
programme.desc: Carrie's hoarding stems from a long string of abuse at the hands of family members. James is an ex-Marine who insists that he is not a hoarder.

programme.title: Hoarders: Kathleen/ Scott
programme.desc: Kathleen's hoarding began after her husband was killed in a train accident. Scott has bought hundreds of buildings and filled them with things he obsessively buys.

programme.title: Hoarders: Constance and Jeri Jo
programme.desc: Constance is a food hoarder and her daughter will contact the authorities if she doesn't get help. Jeri Jo is married to a convicted murderer who's in jail for life, and she claims her loneliness causes her to hoard.

programme.title: Hoarders: Joni and Millie
programme.desc: Child Protective Services had to take Joni's granddaughter away from her because of her hoarding. Also, Millie has already tried to clean up her act, only to relapse and start hoarding again. Daughter Chelsea has one last ultimatum for her.

programme.title: Movie: Snitch
programme.desc: In order to free his son, who was framed during a drug deal, a father goes undercover for the DEA.

programme.title: Movie: Salt
programme.desc: A highly regarded CIA agent, accused of being a Russian spy by a defector, goes on the run to protect her husband. The agent's superiors refuse to believe she's leading a double life until her actions begin to raise doubts.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a weak spot for animals that the other guys love to exploit, who made the best wingman back in his single days and how long it took Q to grow out his hair long enough for a wig.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Baggage Shame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr's old neighbour learns a little TMI about his personal life and which of the jokers Joe would want by his side in a fight.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Eggman
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hump Day
programme.desc: Learn how the crew attracted more customers to eat at GRK, what piece of iconic 'Jokers' history was made in this same focus group space and who caused several delays in the filming of Q's zoo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Eggman
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on some of your favourite episodes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Heart Attack Sauce
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer definitely knows what NOT to touch at a dog show, Joel Kim Booster knows a hipster chicken when he sees one, and Chris Distefano may be single after his flirting in this one.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: It's Damien's House
programme.desc: Megan Neuringer has a surefire sexy way to get out of picking up the check, Julian McCullough takes a lot of heat for his 'drug dealer' shirt, and Tone Bell has harsh words for karaoke goers.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: We're Going Hard Tonight
programme.desc: Paul Virzi proves he's your kids worst camp counselor, Gina Yashere defends women in fedoras, and Josh Wolf risks beheading if he ever travels back to England.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Other's Day
programme.desc: Jessimae Peluso makes an impassioned plea to the church of Scientology, Clayton English explains how Jessimae's name and trailer parks are synonymous, and Noah Gardenswartz is now very worried about his weight.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Hustle vs. Muscle
programme.desc: A muscle-bound competitive eater and his new fiancée appear to have the edge in the pepperdome as they go against a duo of brothers who'll have to put their sibling rivalry aside if they want to walk away with the cash.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: TKOMG
programme.desc: Cocky sisters challenge best bros in the Pepperdome. However, the sauce proves too hot to handle for one team, resulting in the first TKO.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Babish
programme.desc: Binging with Babish may be known for his popular cooking show, but today he tackles spicy food. In a first, he is the first guest to make his own wings.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Nick Offerman
programme.desc: Nick Offerman discusses his love affair with white oak, explores modern masculinity and responds to the internet's favorite Ron Swanson-isms.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: Movie: Ted
programme.desc: It's been 17 years since John Bennett's childhood wish came true, and his teddy bear came to life. Now John's girlfriend Lori wants to marry him, but first she wants the vulgar, hedonistic Ted to move out of their lives. This proves easier said than done.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 4
programme.desc: We’ve got not one, but 20 brain-addled thrill-seekers ready to amaze you with their idiocy, including a bullfighter with bad judgment and smashed-up stunt skiers.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 5
programme.desc: A hung-over hang-glider, several BMX klutzes, and a naked motorcycle stunt guy who gets road rash in the worst possible place.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Thrillseekers 6
programme.desc: An alligator trainer who's almost alligator lunch, a clumsy cliff diver, and an amateur stunt man who will probably never go pro.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Thrillseekers 7
programme.desc: Thrill seekers are captured in their less than fine moments, from flying cars to bikes with two bicyclists.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Chelsea Handler
programme.desc: Chelsea Handler battles the wings of death while discussing skiing, dogs, 50 Cent, HR blunders and more.
